Uses of Package
org.moeaframework.parallel

Packages that use org.moeaframework.parallel
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.parallel
Support for distributed and parallel computing for optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.util.distributed
Classes to enable distributed computing.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.parallel used by org.moeaframework.parallel
    Class
    Description
    DistributedProblem
    Distributes the DistributedProblem.evaluate(Solution) method across multiple threads, cores or compute nodes using the provided ExecutorService.
    FutureSolution
    Represents a Solution evaluated asynchronously.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.parallel used by org.moeaframework.util.distributed
    Class
    Description
    DistributedProblem
    Distributes the DistributedProblem.evaluate(Solution) method across multiple threads, cores or compute nodes using the provided ExecutorService.
